_comment: CALIBRATED + LIVE-TESTED against TopstepX PRACTICE (PRAC-V2) 2026-06-04. VERIFIED: selectors resolve; clicking BUY/SELL submits with NO confirmation dialog; the order submits at the TYPED stop price ONLY when set via real keystrokes + a Tab/blur (a JS value-set leaves the order on the STALE price — that's why buy/sell use 'fill' then 'press Tab', not 'set_value'). PREREQS before arming: (1) order card 'Order Type' = 'Stop Market' (persists); (2) set your Position Bracket (SL/TP) in TopStep's bracket settings — there are no per-order SL/TP fields, so the bot's stop_loss_points/take_profit_points are NOT pushed here; (3) keep the chart on the contract you trade (price is read from the page title). cancel_by_price + position_size are grounded but NOT yet tested with an actual fill — use SEMI-AUTO until you verify One-Trade in sim. Test dry-run, then SIM, before any funded use.
name: projectx
